about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Sociologist · Researcher · Policy Analyst
about.summary: I am a graduate sociologist from Freie Universität Berlin with a strong foundation in social research, policy analysis, and community engagement. My academic work focuses on migration, integration, social inequality, and the intersection of policy with lived experience.
about.academic: Academically, I am drawn to questions of belonging, civic participation, and how structural conditions shape individual trajectories — particularly for migrants, refugees, and minority communities in contemporary Germany and Europe.
about.career: I aspire to contribute my expertise in an applied research, policy coordination, or HR & diversity role within a think tank, international organisation, university, NGO, or public institution where evidence-based thinking genuinely shapes outcomes.
about.values: I believe in rigorous, ethical, and accessible research. I am committed to working across disciplinary and cultural boundaries, to elevating underrepresented voices, and to producing work that is both intellectually sound and practically relevant.
